scripts.dev: bun run --cwd ../packages/decks build -- --clean=false && node ../scripts/run-with-typescript-parser.cjs vp dev
scripts.build: bun run --cwd ../packages/decks build && node ../scripts/run-with-typescript-parser.cjs vp build --mode client && node ../scripts/run-with-typescript-parser.cjs vp build
scripts.test: bun run decks:compile && node ../scripts/run-with-typescript-parser.cjs vp test run
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
